caption: The video begins with an expansive view of a large, empty stadium, showcasing its vibrant red seating and well-maintained green field under a partly cloudy sky. The scene transitions to the exterior of the stadium where a team bus labeled "Real Madrid" is parked. A player, wearing casual attire and a face mask, exits the bus and walks towards the entrance, greeted by staff members who are also wearing masks. The atmosphere suggests preparation for a match or event, with a focus on safety measures like social distancing and mask-wearing. The setting conveys a sense of anticipation and professionalism as the team arrives at the venue.
